delivery.raw: オンライン同期型+非同期型

summary: Understanding the structure of epidemiologic studies is important when applying for a Grant. This class will provide basics of study design that is useful for feasible epidemiologic study. It will also provide you various types and characteristics of Research Grant that you can apply. Students will write Grant Proposal for hypothetical research plan.
aims: Understanding the structure of epidemiologic studies is important when applying for a Grant. This class will provide basics of study design that is useful for feasible epidemiologic study. It will also provide you various types and characteristics of Research Grant that you can apply. Students will write Grant Proposal for hypothetical research plan.
goals: to understand the sequence of grant application for scientific research
to be able to write a research proposal

plan.text:
・疫学研究デザインの基本
・仮想の研究計画について助成金提案書を作成
・医学文献の検索
授業実施時期は別途調整（例年 7月の土日集中講義による実施）。

textbooks: Stephen B Hulley、 Steven R Cummings MD. Designing Clinical Research. Lippincott William & Wilkins 2013.
prereq: 疫学研究を立案するとともに、研究費の申請書を作成する。
prep: 自己学習およびレポート作成

officeHour.name: 菅沼成文
